{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323144853C023F5A98F00538919C6"}"},"total":2462},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7072926022496895775","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书必火，主角聪明又有判断能力，虽然心怀天下苍生，但也不会盲目圣母，而且配角智商都在线，蜀山大派的弟子作风也十分敞亮，没有那么多嫉妒陷害，这本书绝不亚于通幽小儒仙，只要后期不崩，绝对封神，番茄，我认为这本书是值得一追的，反正就是大赞","text_exts":[{"e":81,"s":76,"text":"通幽小儒仙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%80%9A%E5%B9%BD%E5%B0%8F%E5%84%92%E4%BB%99&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774248533538919C6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227072926022496895775%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227062556527642545193%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%80%9A%E5%B9%BD%E5%B0%8F%E5%84%92%E4%BB%99%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1646793924,"group_id":"7062556527642545193","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"用我的方式讲述我的故事","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+tskwbIvqoq3Vf6cE2x47pUttIBwoW/+59j+8xU7t51","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/69403e4e89374897be02098bd7727d52~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794355&x-signature=WktXDoDMivHCWXDH1klBrYlrYtI%3D","user_id":"2727251470202419","user_name":"道之妖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2727251470202419","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1688321725,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7062556527642545193","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+偏传统+无敌+剑道+不降智打脸】
　　少年陆沉，穿越神鬼横行的志怪世界，成为蜀山弟子。
　　修炼是不可能修炼的。
　　只能刷刷怪，做做任务，勉强维持生活。
　　于是多年后，蜀山多了一个无敌世间的执剑人。
　　执三尺青锋，背负人间苍生，斩妖，杀鬼，灭神，诛仙，陨圣……
　　试问黄泉九霄，诸般鬼神，谁敢来此人间？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bfba37472b51bcdb214b29efbfcf642d","author":"少年剑神","author_id":"","book_id":"7062556527642545193","book_name":"蜀山剑仙，刷怪奖励天意剑法","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":80,"name":"剑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=80&name=剑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7062561498832306728","read_count":"33766","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1463521"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"696","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,剑道,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4e298aaafd35c02bdff229ab8c8b80bd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779432533&x-signature=pfCw6syvsRmUXkvpiIq8vU88cjw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2032374423232520","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.837518e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323144853C023F5A98F00538919C6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读47分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"li ten_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9915,"reply_count":7,"show_pv":97732},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1647245702,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7556591606187655960","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看着看着把前面剧情忘了[捂脸]不过感觉还行，就是女主不确定 。评价如下：
主角杀伐果断但不是乱杀无辜。
系统加点变强，主角机缘不断一身实力大半靠法宝。
世界观人仙魔仨方世界，人界是秦朝为背景但是始皇帝死了，仙界和魔界都想霸占人界，人界布置了大镇不让他们进入，仙界靠让仙人转生到人界潜伏图谋，魔界靠类似魔气的腐蚀人界大阵让妖魔乱世人界，人界由一个王朝和几大宗门镇压大阵。
战力设定很拉，化神就人界顶尖战力了，一个元婴无敌巅峰就能差点把顶尖宗门给灭了，最顶级宗门才10万弟子然后最强弟子才金丹，属实难绷
其他先不说了后面没看呢有点看了过几个月在看回来补评","text_exts":[{"e":43,"s":39,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774248533538919C6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227556591606187655960%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227062556527642545193%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759407530,"group_id":"7062556527642545193","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"虚拟海洋深处，碧蓝舰影，心藏秘密宝藏。      ——月曦夏","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/5JT6LwtZBuuXiVRjqRg0U=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4d1c4931bf8f4ef289a998006bfe2005~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794335&x-signature=aHOfS%2FynuvgaWWX8bw%2BC9BLB%2B%2Bw%3D","user_id":"809679072812299","user_name":"月曦夏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"809679072812299","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7062556527642545193","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+偏传统+无敌+剑道+不降智打脸】
